chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No.204 of 2023 (Pakistan Beverages Ltd Vs. Federation of Pakistan & others) High Court Appeal No.205 of 2023 (Pakola Products Ltd Vs. Federation of Pakistan & others) Dated Order with signature of Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Justice Ms. Sana Akram Minhas H.C.A No.204 of 2023 1. For order on office objection a/w reply at A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 1988/2023 (stay) 4. For hearing of CMA No. 1989/2023 (stay) H.C.A No.205 of 2023 1. For orders on CMA No. 1991/2023 2. For order on office objection a/w reply at A 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No. 1993/2023 (stay) 5. For hearing of CMA No. 1994/2023 (stay) Dated 08.05.2024 Ms. Maryam Riaz Advocate for the Appellants Mr. Kashif Hanif Advocate for SSGC Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General for Federation of Pakistan.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Kashif Hanif Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.2/SSGC, which is taken on record. He submits that the question involved in these appeals are otherwise covered by a judgment of a Division Bench of this Court passed in High Court Appeal No. 92 of 2023. He submits that conclusion and the reasoning assigned therein may be applied to these two appeals effectively. Appellants’ counsel has no objection to the applicability of the judgment, which is otherwise binding as the issues are identical and hence covered. The appeals are disposed of on the same reasoning and conclusion mutatis mutandis, along with listed applications. Office to place copy of this order in connected appeal. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
